title: CCL - UI
scenario: Conversation Clarity Limiter settings UI displays three radio button options with descriptions in Device Settings > Advanced on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
4. Scroll down and tap on 'Advanced' to expand the Advanced settings section.
6. Observe the description text displayed below the CCL section header.

7. Observe the three radio button options and their labels/subtitles:
   - 'No Noise Block' with subtitle 'Optimized for voice isolation'
   - 'AI Noise Block' with subtitle 'Enhanced for hybrid work environments'
   - 'UC Noise Block' with subtitle 'Best for open office environments'
8. Tap on each radio button option to verify selection behavior.
expected: The CCL section is displayed in Device Settings > Advanced with the description: "Limit the amount of nearby conversation transmitted through your microphone. (Note: changes will take effect on the next call.)" Three radio button options are present: No Noise Block ("Optimized for voice isolation"), AI Noise Block ("Enhanced for hybrid work environments"), and UC Noise Block ("Best for open office environments"). Each option is selectable via radio button, and only one option can be selected at a time.
